buildCommand: npm run build && mkdir -p dist/overview/assets && cp -r overview dist/ && cp assets/icon.png dist/overview/assets/ && sed -i 's|</head>|<link rel="manifest" href="/manifest.json"><link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="/apple-touch-icon.png"><meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes"><meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent"><meta name="theme-color" content="#7C003A"></head>|' dist/index.html
